subcodes.first_line: O beloved handmaiden of God! The proof of this glory lieth in thy occupation with service and thy familiarity with bearing difficulties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز خدا و دلیل بر این عزت آنست که بخدمات مشغولی و بتحمل زحمات مالوف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
